entries.definition:
from] women during menstruation.
مَعْزُولُون maʿzūlūn [pl. of pass. part. مَعْزُول maʿzūl] segregated,
shut off, removed, barred (26:212) إنهم عن السمع لمعزولون indeed
they are barred from [over] hearing.

مَعْزِل maʿzil [v. n./adv. of place.] separation; a place far
removed from the rest (11:42) ونادى نوح ابنه وكان في معزل and Noah
called to his son, who was [standing] apart.
entries.definition_english:
from] women during menstruation.
مَعْزُولُون maʿzūlūn [pl. of pass. part. مَعْزُول maʿzūl] segregated,

مَعْزِل maʿzil [v. n./adv. of place.] separation; a place far
removed from the rest (11:42) ونادى نوح ابنه وكان في معزل and Noah
called to his son, who was [standing] apart.

entries.definition:
ʿ–z–w a group of people, to attribute, to ascribe, to trace back,
to console, to support. Of this root, only عِزِينَ ʿizīn occurs once in the Qurʾan.

عِزِينَ ʿizīn [pl. of n. عِزَة ʿizatun] group, crowd, company (70:37) عَنِ الْيَمِينِ وَعَنِ الشِّمَالِ عِزِينَ on the right and on the left in crowds.
